name: Chimera Golf Club
about: Chimera Golf Club is an 18-hole course located in Henderson, NV, featuring a TrackMan-powered driving range and on-site dining at Slice 19 Grill and Bar. The venue offers standard golf play, along with specialty formats like FlingGolf and FootGolf, and hosts events through its Pavilion event center. A rewards program and pro shop are available for members and guests, with private lessons and leagues also offered. The facility emphasizes its community focus, including partnerships with local charities like HopeLink, and provides amenities for both golfers and non-golfers.
why_golfers_like_it: TrackMan-powered driving range with precise ball data tracking
Variety of golf formats including FlingGolf and FootGolf
On-site dining and event facilities for post-golf activities

food_and_drink.notes: Full menu available at Slice 19 Grill and Bar, including pizza, burgers, sandwiches, soup, and salad; open to the public.
Available at Slice 19 Grill and Bar, with wine included in some event packages.

simulator_hardware.notes: Driving range system with ball conversion technology

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Clubs are required for standard golf play, FlingGolf, and FootGolf. Rental clubs may be available through the pro shop.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned, but Slice 19 Grill and Bar offers on-site dining and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Standard play time is not specified, but typical 18-hole rounds take 4-5 hours depending on pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers FootGolf and family-friendly dining options at Slice 19 Grill and Bar.
